violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sanitizer was at 170 PPM. Needs to be at 272-700 ppm. Replenish more frequently.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Small butter containers need to be kept refrigerated per container instructions.
